fields.funding_signal: Public Crunchbase and funding search pages did not expose accessible funding detail.
fields.job_post_signal: Public careers/search pages were checked, but no explicit open role cards were visible.
fields.layoff_signal: no layoffs.csv match found for Vercel
fields.leadership_change_signal: Public news/search pages were checked, but no explicit leadership change was visible.
fields.bench_match_summary: Bench match is guided by public signals from layoffs.
fields.competitor_gap_position: Vercel is classified as unknown with medium confidence from live public evidence.
fields.recommended_hook: Funding confidence is low; layoff confidence is medium; AI maturity score is 0/3.
